title: pais #3816
definition:
1) a child, boy or girl
    1a) infants, children
 2) servant, slave
    2a) an attendant, servant, spec. a king's attendant, minister

 Sinonim   : Lihat Definisi \\5868\\
                        dan \\5943\\
